HGSS.515.0000:
Welcome to the Pokémon League!\f
Allow me to introduce myself.
I am Will.\f
I have trained all around the world,\f
making my Psychic-type Pokémon
powerful.\f
And, at last, I’ve been accepted into
the Elite Four.\r
I can only keep getting better!\r
Losing is not an option!\f
HGSS.515.0001:
Even though I was defeated, I won’t
change my course.\f
I will continue battling until I stand
above all Trainers!\f
Now move on and experience
the true ferocity of the Elite Four.\f
